message:
feat(FJ-P2C-008-D): refactor fj-lax into module boundary skeleton

Split monolithic 1597-line lib.rs into 5 sub-modules:
- arithmetic.rs: binary/unary elementwise ops, dot product
- comparison.rs: eq/ne/lt/le/gt/ge returning Bool
- reduction.rs: reduce_sum/max/min/prod
- tensor_ops.rs: reshape, transpose, broadcast_in_dim, concatenate, slice
- type_promotion.rs: infer_dtype, binary_literal_op, compare_literals

lib.rs is now a thin dispatch layer (~150 lines). All 38 tests pass.
No behavioral changes — pure structural refactoring.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
